session_log.summary: Wired StatusBar to display overall score and strategy name after forge completion. Test #168 now passing. 3 remaining gaps need coding agent (orphan Toast/RepoPickerModal, unused /api/optimizations endpoints). Also committed session 9's uncommitted PromptEdit.svelte SSE duration improvements.

Expanded validation: all 77 passing tests verified across T0-T2. 0 regressions. Code integrity audit clean. Full pipeline e2e confirmed (4/4 stages, score 9/10, RISEN). StatusBar lifecycle (#168) verified. Build clean.

No new integration gaps found from latest coding session (token counts, run header, streaming, auto-switch). All recently-built components properly wired: token count flow (backend→SSE→forge→StageCard/RunHeader), streaming text (chunks→forge→StageOptimize/ForgeArtifact), auto-switch (PromptEdit→editor.setSubTab), total duration/tokens (complete event→finishForge→RunHeader). 3 previously-known gaps (Toast, RepoPickerModal, /api/optimizations) remain flagged for coding agent.

Standard validation (retry of session 13): all 83 passing tests verified across T0-T2. 0 regressions. Audit completed in session 13. Cross-feature integration check clean: build OK, no console errors, history/settings/stats all showing real data. Frontend restarted (was down from session timeout).

31 T2 tests verified: pipeline error handling (#81 failed stage marks as failed + skips subsequent, #82 auto-retry on low score, #95 SSE error events, #103 rate_limit_warning handler, #105 Content-Type), codebase explorer (#110-113 Stage 0 activation/CodebaseContext/analyzer integration/persistence, #114-118 all 5 tool definitions, #119-121 bounds/timeout/filtering, #124 graceful degradation), GitHub repos (#122-123 linking/unlinking, #125-126 repo list + 5min cache), MCP tools (#151-159 all 9 tool registrations + error handling). Fixed MCP WebSocket endpoint (ws_endpoint signature). Added Toast wiring for rate limit warnings. Pipeline stages now wrapped in individual try/except with skip logic.

Wired github store (selectedRepo/branch) into PromptEdit optimize request, enabling Stage 0 codebase exploration via UI. 3 gaps flagged for coding agent: RepoPickerModal orphan, retryOptimization unused, fetchGitHubAuthStatus not called on init.

active_warnings.message: tool_result SSE events not yet emitted from Stage 0 (only tool_call events are yielded). Test #106 needs this for full pass.
MCP github_set_token stores tokens in module-level dict keyed by 'current' (not per-connection). Token is NOT discarded on WebSocket disconnect — test #158 may need refinement.

next_actions.action: RepoPickerModal.svelte is orphaned — needs import into a parent component (e.g. Navigator or PromptEdit) with modal open/close state and a trigger button. Should let user pick from github.repos and call linkRepo() from client.ts to persist selection.

retryOptimization() in client.ts is defined but never called — needs a Retry button in the UI (e.g. RunHeader or a post-forge results view) that calls retryOptimization(id) when user wants to re-run a low-scoring optimization.

fetchGitHubAuthStatus() is not called on app init — GitHub connection state is lost on page refresh. Add an onMount in +layout.svelte (or NavigatorGitHub) that calls fetchGitHubAuthStatus() and hydrates the github store if already connected.

server_state.notes: All services healthy (verified session 16). Backend using claude_cli provider. Frontend dev server on 5199. MCP server RUNNING. DB at backend/data/promptforge.db (3 tables). T0: 18/18, T1: 45/45, T2: 51/106. 114/335 tests passing (34.0%). Full pipeline e2e confirmed working.
